subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of Creation! The Sovereign of Heaven, Who hath been mentioned in the Books of God, the Lord of all worlds, hath come. This Day hath indeed arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الانشاء قد اتی مالک السماء الذی کان مذکورا فی کتب الله رب العالمین قد اتی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @limits of the intellect, @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment
